name: Lemon Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 large egg whites at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crust ingredients in a 9-inch pie plate and mix with fingers.
2. Press crumbs evenly around edges and on the bottom of the pie tin.
3. Bake at 350°F for 6 minutes. Cool before filling.
4. Beat egg whites until frothy. Add cream of tartar and continue to beat at high speed, gradually adding sugar until meringue is stiff.
5. Combine water, lemon juice, and cornstarch in a small saucepan and stir until smooth. Add lemon rind, margarine, and food coloring to the cornstarch mixture and cook over moderate heat until thickened and the starchy taste is gone.
6. Remove from heat and mix sweetener into hot cooked mixture.
7. Fold hot cooked mixture into meringue and mix lightly but thoroughly.
8. Pour filling into crust and refrigerate until firm.
8 servings.
Per serving, including crust: 132 calories, 18 grams carbohydrates, 2 grams protein, 6 grams fat, 130 mg sodium
